metadata.task: Determine which pendulum has a longer period based on its length.
metadata.description: Work from the Pendulum Length Comparison scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: The LLM adjusts the lengths. The longer pendulum (object_2) oscillates with a longer period.
reasoning: The period of a simple pendulum increases with the square root of its length.
